title: narcissus × laetus
intro: Narcissus × laetus, also known as the hybrid daffodil or narcissus, is a cross-breed between the wild narcissus (Narcissus pseudonarcissus) and another species of narcissus, resulting in a unique and diverse plant with various characteristics. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of narcissus × laetus include its ability to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. Herbal preparations of narcissus × laetus include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
